race.comment: FAIRWAY TO HEAVEN (10) nice filly who pulled up with a poor post-race recovery on resumption, with a tiring fifth over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Since fitted with a slick 900m trial victory at Rosehill. Tongue control and lugging bit go on and Tommy Berry sticks from the inside gate. Expected to get off the mark. THE WAY AHEAD (7) close to her top now and Zac Lloyd takes the reins today. Improver at her latest outing when a plugging fourth over 1100m at Goulburn. Raced well on the provincial circuit last prep and the blinkers come off. Stays in the mix. BEDDA MIA (6) surprised at the big odds from a let-up when holding a forward position to finish second over 1000m at this track. Fitter now and the claim helps again. Keep safe. DECOY (9) strips fitter for this after savaging the line on debut with a sound fifth over 1000m at Gosford in a Super Mdn. Drawn out again and look for her late.
